## Checklist

- [ ] Markdown renders correctly.
- [ ] YAML is valid.
- [ ] Shell scripts pass `bash -n`.
- [ ] Python scripts pass `python -m py_compile`.
- [ ] Changes do not imply OSL guarantees funding, GSoC, contributors, mentors, or long-term maintenance.
- [ ] Changes preserve OSI license, Code of Conduct, maintenance, and acknowledgement requirements.
